Step 1: Data Input
The dataset contains 8 cities with individual revenue values:
- Mumbai: 520,000
- New Delhi: 500,000
- Bengaluru: 470,000
- Hyderabad: 450,000
- Pune: 380,000
- Chennai: 340,000
- Ahmedabad: 290,000
- Kochi: 210,000

Step 2: Aggregation Method
Each city appears once in the dataset, so total revenue per city equals the single
row.title: Total revenue by city
